metadata.description: X (Twitter) data extraction skill for AI coding agents. 111 endpoints, 2 MCP tools, reads from $0.00015/call.

plugins.name: x-twitter-scraper
plugins.description: 111 REST API endpoints, 2 MCP tools, 23 extraction types. Tweet search, user lookup, follower extraction, engagement metrics, giveaway draws, trending topics, write actions, credits, and pay-per-use (MPP). Reads from $0.00015/call - 33x cheaper than the official X API.
